ch01:corollary_2.reason: Uses the completeness of finite-dimensional normed linear spaces to argue that every finite-dimensional subspace is closed, as closedness follows from completeness in finite dimensions.

ch01:lemma_2.reason: Uses the fact that closed and bounded sets in finite-dimensional spaces are compact to establish compactness of the closed subset.

ch02:theorem_2.reason: Uses the properties of the norm in inner-product spaces, specifically the Pythagorean theorem and projection arguments, which rely on the Cauchy-Schwarz inequality and the triangle inequality.
